Author: VelvetFFXIV
Name: XIVIgnore
Description: Client-side virtual extension of the FFXIV ignore list: additionally mute and hide players, with categories, notes and auto-expiry. UI available in English and German.
Punchline: Virtually extends the in-game ignore list (client-side).
Changelog: - "Hide nameplate" can now only be selected while the global switch is on.
